content_fingerprint: hugging face adds auto served agents md endpoint to all gradio spaces hugging face has quietly rolled out a machine readable agents md endpoint to every gradio space letting ai coding agents like claude code codex and pi discover and use spaces without manual setup starting april 17 2026 every gradio space hosted on hugging face automatically exposes an agents md endpoint containing a structured machine readable api description the change means ai coding agents can read the endpoint understand what the space does and invoke it correctly all without a human having to configure integration detai
